mapper.select: select * from daily_index.`${symbol}` where trade_date > '2010-01-01' order by trade_date asc;

select a.ts_code,pct_chg,index_code_l1,index_code_l2,index_code_l3,total_mv from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
market = '主板'
market = '创业板'
market = '科创板'
market = '北交所'
and
total_mv > 10000000
total_mv > 1000000 and total_mv < 10000000
total_mv < 1000000

select count(*) from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
market = '主板'
market = '创业板'
market = '科创板'
market = '北交所'
and
total_mv > 10000000
total_mv > 1000000 and total_mv < 10000000
total_mv < 1000000
and pct_chg > #{upLimit}

select count(*) from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
market = '主板'
market = '创业板'
market = '科创板'
market = '北交所'
and
total_mv > 10000000
total_mv > 1000000 and total_mv < 10000000
total_mv < 1000000
and pct_chg < #{downLimit}
select pct_chg from daily_index.`000001` where trade_date = #{tradeDate};
select pct_chg from daily_index.`399001` where trade_date = #{tradeDate};
select pct_chg from daily_index.`399005` where trade_date = #{tradeDate};
select pct_chg from daily_index.`399006` where trade_date = #{tradeDate};
select * from kpl_concept.`${tradeDate}` t ;

select b.ts_code,a.name as concept_name,c.name,a.desc,a.hot_num,c.area,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3, b.pct_chg,b.`close`,b.trade_date,b.total_mv,b.pb,c.market from kpl_concept_cons.`${tradeDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.name= #{name} order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc
select * from dc_index.`${tradeDate}` t ;

select a.concept_name,a.con_code,a.name,a.trade_date,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3,b.market, c.pct_chg,c.pb,c.pe,c.ps,c.amount,c.turnover_rate,c.total_mv from dc_member.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.concept_name=#{name};

select a.name as concept_name,a.con_name as name,a.con_code as ts_code,b.pb,b.total_mv ,c.market,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3, c.province,c.city,c.introduction ,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.name=#{name} order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

select.if: select a.name as concept_name,a.con_name as name,a.con_code as ts_code,b.pb,b.total_mv ,c.market,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3, d.province,d.city,d.main_business,d.business_scope,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code left join stock_list.stock_company as d on c.ts_code = d.ts_code where a.name=#{name} order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

mapper.select: select a.name as concept_name,a.con_name as name,a.con_code as ts_code,b.pb,b.total_mv ,c.market,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3, c.province,c.city,c.list_date ,c.act_name ,c.act_ent_type ,c.exchange ,c.reg_capital ,c.setup_date ,c.website,c.com_name ,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.name=#{name} order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

select a.name as concept_name,b.ts_code,c.name,c.area,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3,b.pct_chg,b.close, b.up10_count5,b.up10_count10,b.up10_count15,b.up10_count20,b.down10_count5,b.down10_count10,b.down10_count15,b.down10_count20, b.conti_up,c.market,b.total_mv,b.pb,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.name = #{name} order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

select a.name as concept_name,b.ts_code,c.name,c.area,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3,b.pct_chg, d.buy_elg_amount,d.buy_lg_amount,d.buy_md_amount,d.buy_sm_amount,d.sell_elg_amount,d.sell_lg_amount,d.sell_md_amount,d.sell_sm_amount,d.net_mf_amount, b.amount,b.turnover_rate,c.market,b.total_mv,b.pb,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code left join money_flow.`20250612` as d on c.ts_code = d.ts_code where a.name = 'AI算力概念' order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

select a.name as concept_name,b.ts_code,c.name,c.area,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3,b.pct_chg, b.y_pct1 ,b.y_pct2 ,b.y_pct3 ,b.y_pct4 ,b.y_pct5 ,b.y_pct6 ,b.y_pct7 ,b.y_pct8 ,b.y_pct9 , b.amount,b.turnover_rate,c.market,b.total_mv,b.pb,b.trade_date from kpl_concept_cons.`20250109` as a left join common_daily.`20250109` as b on a.con_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code left join money_flow.`20250612` as d on c.ts_code = d.ts_code where a.name = 'AI算力概念' order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc;

select industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2,industry_name_l3,index_code_l1 ,index_code_l2 ,index_code_l3 ,count(*) as ct,sum(total_mv) as mv,sum(total_mv/pb) as asset,sum(total_mv/ps_ttm) as income, sum(total_mv/pe_ttm) as profit,sum(amount) as amt,amount/total_mv as turnover,b.trade_date from stock_list.industry_member as a left join common_daily.`20251201` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.stock_company as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
where and group by industry_name_l1 order by mv desc;
where index_code_l1 = #{indexCode} and group by industry_name_l3 order by industry_name_l2,mv desc
where c.province = #{indexCode} and group by industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2 order by industry_name_l1,mv desc
where and order by mv desc;
where index_code_l1 = #{indexCode} and group by industry_name_l2 order by mv desc
where c.province = #{indexCode} and group by industry_name_l1 order by mv desc

select theme_code,trade_date,name,pct_change,z_t_num,main_change,lead_stock,lead_stock_code,lead_stock_pct_change from dc_index.${tradeDate} order by
pct_change
z_t_num
main_change
desc limit 50;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,a.name,a.theme_code,a.reason, b.area, b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3,c.pct_chg,b.market,c.total_mv,c.pb, c.total_mv/c.pb as asset from dc_member.${tradeDate} as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join common_daily.`20251201` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where theme_code = #{themeCode} order by
industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2,industry_name_l3,total_mv
total_mv
asset
desc
